## Checklist

### Code quality
- [ ] `flutter analyze` passes with no new warnings
- [ ] `flutter test` passes; no existing tests were broken or removed
- [ ] New or changed logic is covered by tests (unit, widget, or integration)
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or credentials in this PR

### Conventions
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `test:`, etc.)
- [ ] PR is focused on a single concern (split if needed)
- [ ] New files are in the correct layer/module directory

### Documentation
- [ ] Inline comments explain non-obvious logic
- [ ] Relevant flowmap in `docs/flowmaps/` updated if architecture changed
- [ ] `docs/RELEASE_TRACKER.md` updated if this closes a blocker or completes a checklist item

### Review
- [ ] Self-reviewed diff for typos, debug code, and TODO items
- [ ] CI is green (dart.yml + codeql.yml)
